title: senna alexandrina
intro: Senna alexandrina, also known as Alexandrian senna or Egyptian senna, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anthraquinone glycosides such as sennosides A and B. The health benefits of Senna alexandrina include promoting bowel movements, relieving constipation, and aiding in the treatment of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Senna alexandrina can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tablet, and its seeds or leaves can also be dried and used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal properties.
